title: Exact and Approximate Nearest-Neighbor Indexes · Code Recall
summary: A delayed retrieval review reconstructs exact and approximate nearest-neighbor indexes from source, document, chunk, model, index, query, candidate, response, citation, evaluation, operations, and stakeholder evidence, then attacks one retained misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for ANN recall, latency, and resource experiment after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defens…
objectives: Build an exact flat-search oracle on a bounded corpus for correctness, recall comparison, and changed-filter tests.
Explain and tune HNSW construction, search breadth, graph degree, recall, latency, memory, updates, and deletion behavior.
Explain coarse partitioning, probes, product or scalar quantization, training data, compression loss, and rebuild requirements.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

steps.title: RAG and Python Separate evidence from confidence · Review Rag Ann Capacity Selection
steps.instruction:
review case — A review RAG engineering team handles case 2058 during a multilingual support escalation. Build deterministic Python evidence to compare exact, HNSW, IVF, and quantized indexes with recall, latency, memory, and filter evidence; measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score; then replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Select index and parameters from corpus size, updates, filters, recall target, p95 latency, build time, memory, cost, and recovery evidence.

Inspect the Rag Ann Capacity Selection trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Ann Capacity Selection
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Rag Ann Capacity Selection: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review RAG engineering team handles case 1025 during an incident-response knowledge search. Build deterministic Python evidence to compare exact, HNSW, IVF, and quantized indexes with recall, latency, memory, and filter evidence; preserve source provenance, tenant authorization, deletion, freshness, citation offsets, and untrusted-data separation; then move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Select index and parameters from corpus size, updates, filters, recall target, p95 latency, build time, memory, cost, and recovery evidence.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Ann Capacity Selection.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Ann Capacity Selection, keep Rag Ann Capacity Selection connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.
